message: Come on, I brought you here, so enjoy yourself more.
Honestly, it's your shy nature that's the problem.
Hey there, Detective, you planning to give me a lecture?
I've been wanting to ask you for a while now,
Guy showed it with his pinky raised.
No way! Where did that story come from?
I mean, come on, you're practically inviting it today, so I can't help but be suspicious.
Too bad. I had no one to invite.
Well, if you got a little sexier, you might actually pull it off.
Saying that in front of her would be scary.
Yeah. She does seem like the type that could be surprisingly persistent.
I don't know how you see it, but they might actually be a good match? I have a feeling about it.
Are you really that worried about your assistant's reputation?
Well, it's just that if I leave her to her own devices, I can't predict what she might do.
Ah, speaking of which, don't ask too many questions about your past.
Oh. Were you liked or something?
Like, what did you talk about?
I mean, what am I supposed to talk about in your dull past?
That's harsh. But it's a fair point.
It's fine, I haven't said anything that would put you at a disadvantage.
I think it's a concern, but be careful.
Unfortunately, I don't know anything about her. What's up, are you interested in her?
No, not in a romantic way, just general interest.
Well, whatever, I just hope the two leading actresses show up soon.
I'm not recommending the director's daughter.
Go for the actresses, the actresses!
Speaking of which, did you do something to her?
Well, I shouldn't have done anything.
When we talked earlier, she asked about you; those were definitely the eyes of a woman in love.
Eyes of a woman in love? You can tell that?
I’m at the age where I can recognize that much. What a terrible detective you are.
Anyway, if you’re not interested, you should avoid actions that might lead to misunderstandings.
It’s not that big of a deal.
You’re so dense. You missed out on a few chances back in school because of that. You haven’t changed at all.
If you don’t like her, it’s wiser to just not care.
Tony? Oh, you mean Tony Ford.
He looks like he’s not having any fun.
Well, I just thought talking about dudes in a place like this isn’t interesting.
He’s not the type I like. Those snake-like eyes of his. It makes my skin crawl, don’t you think?
Nah, I don’t know him that well.
Let me tell you, you should be careful around that guy. It’s better to avoid getting involved with him.
Let’s talk about something more fun, okay?
Did you know about Tony Ford?
Well, everybody knows him; he’s that famous.
What's up? You look like you want to say something.
Just so you know, I don’t care how he said it, that guy and I aren't friends.
What? So you knew him after all.
Just a little. Thanks to him, I've got to deal with this nonsense.
Sorry, but please don't dig any deeper about me knowing him. I really don't want the director to find out.
Yeah, that guy is the problem.
I can't even talk to Cindy with that woman in the way.
Yeah, but that just makes her too tight-lipped.
A type like her isn’t going to attract guys. She seems inflexible and doesn’t look kind at all, right?
That’s a bit much. She’s just trying to protect Cindy from you.
What’s that? You're trying to pick a fight? You’re cold even though we've been friends for so long.
I don't have an ounce of courage to pick a fight with you, Guy.
And no muscle, either. Ha ha ha.
Anyway, I need to figure out a way to deal with that woman to get close to Cindy.
what does she think she is?
Are you really that upset about not being able to talk to Cindy?
Hey, hey, this isn't something to laugh about. Do you really think that just talking will get Cindy pregnant, that woman?
You've really lost a lot of trust, huh?
That's right. For someone like the great Guy to be so pathetic.
I haven't done anything for her to hold a grudge against me.
You hugged Cindy right in front of me, didn't you?
That's just a little bit of social nicety, isn't it?
Ah, it would have been different with Cindy-chan if that guy hadn't been around.
Whoa, whoa, whoa, Cindy is cute. It's my first time seeing her up close, and she's just so adorable.
That's a statement that could lead to misunderstandings.
I couldn't care less what the lady thinks.
It sounds a bit childish, but if she's that cute, I can forgive it.
What happened all of a sudden?
No, I was just thinking that girls being cute is the best.
I'm definitely going to make a move on Cindy-chan.
I really want to talk to Cindy.
Then why not go talk to Cindy instead of talking to me?
But the gatekeeper is so noisy.
You know, the other day when I was interviewed, I said I was a fan of Cindy.
What am I doing at my age?
Is it really that shocking? Apparently, Cindy said,
Yeah, it might not be exactly right, but someone interviewed her.
Ever since then, I couldn’t wait to see her and talk to her.
Hey, could you help me find a chance to talk to Cindy?
Doesn’t she remind you of someone?
Well, if you don’t notice, it’s fine, but I felt her eyes looked really similar.
You're a detective, so just remember for yourself.
Looking at her, she has an innocent vibe. She could totally pull off Juliet's look.
Yeah, that might be because of her hairstyle.
? So what the heck does that even mean?
I might be more suited to being a detective.
Oh, by the way, my恋人役 was Jennifer. Did we have any intimate scenes, I wonder?
No, I was surprised. I thought Meryl was an old hag close to 40, but she doesn't look anything like that at all.
Isn't that because she's an actress?
Man, women are really deep, you know.
Why are you turning red, man?
Meryl was supposed to be the director's girlfriend, right?
You're really out of touch with this kind of talk.
It's okay not to know everything.
He seems hard to please, and I'm not good at buttering people up.
I respect him, who is called a master of Hollywood. I've seen all his works, you know.
You see, I suddenly became a fan after I got cast.
I thought so. After all, Guy was the kind of guy who couldn't sit still for long.
He's a real sportsman, you know.
Just between us, I hear the director has brought their partner along this time.
Which do you think it is?
I can't just answer that out of the blue!
Come on, for a detective, that's pretty pathetic,
I hope you do a good job this time too.
Speaking of the director, there's something I'm a bit worried about.
If you get on the director's good side, you could have a career as an actor after retirement.
Unbelievable, is that what you're thinking?
I'm considering a lot of things. In a job where your body is the capital, if you lose your stamina, there's no future. It's natural to think about a career change while you're young.
It would be best to live without worrying about eating like you do, but unfortunately, I don't have relatives who can leave me such an inheritance.
You seem like a better person than I expected, which is a relief.
Anyway, we'll handle our own problems.
So when are you guys having the ceremony?
Why are you worrying about that?
Could it be that things aren't going well?
Well, I haven't talked to them either.
We've been friends for a long time, but we can't be all clingy forever.
Isn't it better if we don't talk about such things right now?
I didn't grow to dislike you or anything.
Small differences in our thinking piled up and before we knew it, we had strayed off course.
I'm sure time will sort things out.
No, but right now we're thinking about what's best for each other. I'm considering various things.
Just observe what he has to say.
Have you heard about the serial murder case?
No, I’m not good with that kind of stuff.
What’s up? Why suddenly bring that up?
Tony was wondering what kind of guy he thinks the culprit is.
Ignoring what that guy says is the right call. Either way, there's no way you could come up with an answer.
Sorry, but I’m really not interested. I haven’t even seen any articles related to it.
